title: conditional go release gzip portability
rawUserRequest: Continue the Conditional GO document Work Item workflow and publish the new version after all required evidence is complete.

declaredIntent.summary: Make source-bound release archive bytes stable across macOS and Ubuntu runners by using a fixed Python gzip implementation in workflow and regression test.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: same source tree produces the declared archive digest on local and runner-compatible Python gzip

outOfScope: Plan implementation Work Items other than release-integrity follow-up

sources.reason: Release archive workflow and regression evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Bounded workflow/test compression implementation with source-bound digest verification.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan and publication.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: .github/workflows/release.yml and tests/test_release_archive_contract.sh invoke the same Python gzip parameters
releaseArchive.sha256 equals the archive produced by the regression test
Finish Gate, PR checks, merge, closure, and default-branch synchronization complete
guidelines: Keep the archive format and prefix unchanged.
Do not weaken source-bound digest verification.

intent.problem: The release workflow fails after the exact-SHA checks because Apple gzip and runner gzip produce different archive bytes for the same tar stream.
constraints: Do not publish before lifecycle closure.
intent.rationale: A fixed Python gzip implementation is available on the runner and can produce the same bytes in the workflow and regression test.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan and publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
